name: Dense Open Office
description: Maximizes seat count in minimal space with open benching and hot desks. Best for high-density tech teams, call centers, or organizations prioritizing collaboration over privacy.

name: Traditional Office
description: Balanced mix of open and private workspaces with standard benching and workstations. Suitable for corporate environments with moderate privacy needs.

name: Private Office Predominant
description: Majority private offices with supporting open work areas. Ideal for executives, senior leadership floors, or roles requiring high confidentiality.

name: Tech/Creative
description: Flexible, activity-based workspace with adjustable desks and collaborative zones. Designed for product teams, designers, and engineering groups that value agility.

name: Professional Services
description: Structured layout balancing client-facing meeting spaces with individual focus areas. Suited for consulting, accounting, and advisory firms.

name: Legal Services
description: Heavy private office allocation with generous support and meeting areas. Tailored for law firms, judiciary offices, and compliance-heavy organizations.

name: Co-Working
description: Maximum shared amenities with flexible hot-desking and minimal assigned seats. Perfect for co-working operators, incubators, and shared workspace providers.

name: Modular
description: Built around prefabricated and modular room systems — phone booths, meeting pods, focus pods, and demountable offices. High meeting allocation supports a plug-and-play room inventory. Suited for organizations that want flexibility to reconfigure without construction.

name: Creative Agency (Hybrid)
description: Studio culture with heavy collaboration, pin-up/crit spaces, and hybrid attendance. Low work allocation offset by high meeting (enclosed crit rooms, client presentation) and generous common space. No private offices. Designed for agencies, design studios, and creative teams where peak occupancy is 40-60% of headcount.

name: Legal (Modern/Lean)
description: Density-optimized law firm with minimal private offices (10%), lean support staffing, and digital-first workflows. Maximizes attorney headcount by pushing work zone high and keeping common/BOH tight. 5-day in-office, no desk sharing. Suited for litigation boutiques, legal tech, and modern mid-size firms.
